items.informed_by_trend: AP x Swatch Royal Pop wrist conversion kit launches
items.preview: This 3D-printed Royal Pop kit just launched.

copy.hook_0_3s: This 3D-printed Royal Pop kit just launched.
copy.body_3_25s: Here’s the Cults3D adapter—no tool, no pouch, no spare spring bars. Just a printed cradle that wobbles on the lugs. Our Premium bundle: machined aluminium, hand-finished end-links, microfibre pouch, spare screw bars, and a precision-fit that seats flush with the case-back. Same price, zero compromise.
copy.cta_25_30s: Which one would you trust on your Royal Pop? Comment WRIST.
b_roll: Close-up: Cults3D adapter clipped onto Royal Pop—shows visible gap at lugs.
Side-by-side on wrist: Cults3D (loose) vs Premium (flush).
Tool roll call: Cults3D (empty) vs Premium (pouch contents laid out).
Text overlay: 'Tool included? No / Yes' (appears on screen for 3 seconds).
copy.caption:
This 3D-printed Royal Pop kit just launched. 

Cults3D adapter: no tool, no pouch, printed cradle wobbles. Royal Pop Premium bundle: machined aluminium, hand-finished end-links, microfibre pouch, spare screw bars, zero wobble. 

Which would you trust? Comment WRIST for waitlist link. 

Independent brand. Not affiliated with Swatch or Audemars Piguet.

shot_list.notes: 9:16 vertical frame, side lighting to exaggerate gap, static shot.

ai_prompts.prompt: A high-end product video showing two forearms side by side in a dark moody studio. Left forearm wears a bioceramic octagonal pocket watch with a loose-fitting 3D-printed adapter, visible gap at the lugs. Right forearm wears the same watch with a machined aluminium adapter that fits flush against the case-back. Controlled side lighting highlights the fit difference. The scene is premium, restrained, and focuses on the precision of the adapter. No text, no logos, no faces, no cluttered background.
ai_prompts.negative_prompt: text overlay, watermark, low quality, blurry, cartoon, illustration, AP logo, Swatch logo, neon colours, full faces, lifestyle elements, cluttered background, competitor branding, Helvetus, Wristbuddys

ai_prompts.prompt: A CAD-style exploded view of a premium watch adapter kit in a dark studio setting. The components include machined aluminium end-links, screw bars, and a matte black adapter base. The parts are arranged in a linear exploded view, floating slightly apart, with a dark moody background and controlled side lighting. The materials are brushed silver and matte black, with a focus on precision engineering. No text, no logos, no branding, no faces.
ai_prompts.negative_prompt: text overlay, watermark, low quality, blurry, cartoon, illustration, AP logo, Swatch logo, neon colours, lifestyle elements, cluttered background, competitor branding, Helvetus, Wristbuddys

ai_prompts.prompt: A close-up swatch of two watch straps in a dark moody studio. On the left, an oxblood leather strap with a premium machined aluminium end-link attached. On the right, a black silicone strap with the same end-link. The lighting is controlled and side-lit to highlight the texture and quality of the materials. The background is dark and uncluttered, with no text, no logos, and no branding visible.

visual_brief.filming_notes: Use a tripod for stability. Ensure side lighting is consistent across all live shots to maintain the dark moody aesthetic. For the side-by-side wrist shot, film each wrist separately and composite in post if needed. Keep the background clean and unbranded.

items.informed_by_trend: Royal Pop strap ecosystem exploding: Helvetus, Wristbuddys, Wisstraps, Delugs
items.preview: This is why most Royal Pop straps feel cheap.

copy.hook_0_3s: This is why most Royal Pop straps feel cheap.
copy.body_3_25s: Generic straps sit loose—gaps at the lugs, wobble on the wrist. Our kit clips in with a machined cradle adapter. Tight tolerance, zero play. The silicone strap? Hand-finished, no mould lines. No shortcuts.
b_roll: Slow-motion clip: adapter snapping into Royal Pop case-back, no gap at lugs
Side-by-side: loose generic strap vs. flush adapter fit
Close-up: silicone strap texture, no seams, brushed steel clasp
Wrist shot: adapter seated, no wobble during movement
copy.caption: This is why most Royal Pop straps feel cheap. Our kit clips in with a machined cradle adapter—tight tolerance, zero play. Early access: link in bio. Independent brand. Not affiliated with Swatch or Audemars Piguet.

shot_list.description: Extreme close-up of a generic Royal Pop strap loosely attached to the case, visible gap at lugs, slight wobble when shaken
shot_list.notes: Top-down framing, dark moody studio lighting, 10x macro lens attachment if available

shot_list.description: Slow-motion clip: matte black machined cradle adapter snapping into Royal Pop case-back, no gap at lugs, flush fit
shot_list.notes: Side angle, controlled side lighting to highlight adapter edges, 120fps

shot_list.description: Side-by-side comparison: left side shows loose generic strap with visible gap, right side shows flush adapter fit (both on Royal Pop case)
shot_list.notes: Split-screen, dark moody background, brushed steel and black accents, smooth transition between sides

shot_list.description: Close-up of hand-finished silicone strap texture, no mould lines, brushed steel clasp detail
shot_list.notes: Top-down or slight angle, side lighting to emphasize texture, no shadows on strap

shot_list.notes: Dark moody background, controlled side lighting, smooth wrist rotation, oxblood strap color

shot_list.notes: Overhead shot, side lighting to highlight textures, minimalist composition

shot_list.notes: Black background, white or brushed silver outlines, no shading, 9:16 aspect ratio

ai_prompts.prompt: A split-screen video showing a side-by-side comparison of two Royal Pop watch cases. On the left side, a generic strap is loosely attached with visible gaps at the lugs, showing a wobbly fit. On the right side, a matte black machined cradle adapter is clipped into the case-back, showing a flush, tight fit with no gaps. The background is a dark moody studio setting with controlled side lighting, brushed steel and black accents. The video transitions smoothly between the two sides, emphasizing the precision of the adapter fit. The Royal Pop case is octagonal-ish with a central crown, rendered in a premium, restrained style.
ai_prompts.negative_prompt: text overlay, watermark, low quality, blurry, cartoon, illustration, AP logo, Swatch logo, full face, lifestyle filler, cluttered background, neon colours, mould lines, seams, loose fit on right side

ai_prompts.prompt: A slow-motion video of a wrist wearing a Royal Pop watch with a machined cradle adapter seated on the case-back. The adapter is matte black, and the strap is oxblood-colored silicone. The wrist moves smoothly, showing no wobble or gaps at the lugs. The background is a dark moody studio setting with controlled side lighting, emphasizing the premium, restrained aesthetic. Only the forearm is visible, with no full face or lifestyle elements. The Royal Pop case is octagonal-ish with a central crown, rendered in a realistic, high-quality style.
ai_prompts.negative_prompt: text overlay, watermark, low quality, blurry, cartoon, illustration, AP logo, Swatch logo, full face, lifestyle filler, cluttered background, neon colours, loose fit, gaps at lugs

ai_prompts.prompt: A CAD-style outline of a machined cradle adapter clipped into a Royal Pop watch case, showing a tight tolerance fit with no gaps. The adapter is matte black, and the case is octagonal-ish with a central crown. The background is pure black, and the outlines are white or brushed silver, with no shading or color. The image is rendered in a minimalist, technical style, emphasizing precision and engineering. The aspect ratio is 9:16.
ai_prompts.negative_prompt: text overlay, watermark, low quality, blurry, cartoon, illustration, AP logo, Swatch logo, color, shading, gradients, full face, lifestyle elements, cluttered background, neon colours

visual_brief.filming_notes: Use a dark, moody studio setup with controlled side lighting to highlight textures and edges. Ensure all live shots are steady and in focus, especially for macro details. For slow-motion clips, use 120fps to capture smooth motion. Avoid any reflections or distractions in the background.

items.preview:
The Royal Pop deserves better than a random strap.

We’re building a premium wrist conversion kit—adapter, strap, tool, and pouch. No scratches. No wobble. Just

copy.caption:
The Royal Pop deserves better than a random strap.

We’re building a premium wrist conversion kit—adapter, strap, tool, and pouch. No scratches. No wobble. Just a proper wristwatch that stays on your wrist, not in your pocket.

Early access opens soon. Comment WRIST for waitlist link.

Independent brand. Not affiliated with Swatch or Audemars Piguet.

shot_list.description: Close-up of the Royal Pop bioceramic pocket watch resting on a dark textured surface, adapter clipped onto the case, strap partially threaded through the adapter loops, side-lit to emphasize matte black adapter and strap texture
shot_list.notes: 4:5 frame, tight crop on watch and adapter, no background clutter, moody studio lighting with soft shadows

shot_list.description: Forearm (skin tone neutral) wearing the Royal Pop as a wristwatch, adapter and strap fully secured, watch face angled slightly upward, dark moody background with subtle brushed silver reflections
shot_list.notes: 4:5 frame, focus on wrist and watch, no visible fingers or full arm, controlled side lighting to highlight strap texture and adapter finish

ai_prompts.prompt: A high-detail close-up of a bioceramic octagonal pocket watch with a central crown, resting on a dark charcoal textured surface. A matte black clip-in adapter is securely attached to the watch case, with a default silicone strap partially threaded through the adapter loops. The scene is lit with controlled side lighting, casting soft shadows and emphasizing the texture of the adapter and strap. The background is minimal and out of focus, with subtle brushed silver reflections. Moody studio atmosphere, premium product photography style, 8K resolution.
ai_prompts.negative_prompt: text overlay, watermark, low quality, blurry, cartoon, illustration, AP logo, Swatch logo, neon colors, cluttered background, full face, fingers, bright lighting, lifestyle elements, competitor branding

ai_prompts.prompt: A forearm wearing a bioceramic octagonal pocket watch converted into a wristwatch using a matte black clip-in adapter and a default silicone strap. The watch is securely fastened, with the face angled slightly upward. The scene is set against a dark moody background with subtle brushed silver reflections, emphasizing the premium finish of the adapter and strap. Controlled side lighting highlights the texture of the strap and the adapter's matte surface. The forearm is neutral in skin tone, with no visible fingers or full arm. Moody studio atmosphere, product photography energy, 8K resolution.
ai_prompts.negative_prompt: text overlay, watermark, low quality, blurry, cartoon, illustration, AP logo, Swatch logo, neon colors, cluttered background, full face, fingers, bright lighting, lifestyle elements, competitor branding, full body, distracting elements

visual_brief.filming_notes: N/A for this caption piece. All visuals will be generated via AI. Ensure generated images adhere to the dark moody studio aesthetic with controlled side lighting and premium product focus.

copy.body_3_25s: If it’s going on the wrist, it can’t fall off. We machined a precision-fit cradle that seats into the lugs—zero wobble. The interior is lined with microfibre to protect the case-back. Shake test: passed. No scratches, no movement.
copy.cta_25_30s: Tell me what this should cost—comment below.
b_roll: Close-up of adapter clipping onto Royal Pop lugs (slow-motion)
Hand shaking the watch vigorously, adapter stays locked
Macro shot of microfibre-lined interior against case-back
copy.caption:
Day 2: Testing the adapter’s grip. If it’s going on the wrist, it can’t fall off. Precision-fit cradle + microfibre lining = zero scratches, zero wobble. 

Independent brand. Not affiliated with Swatch or Audemars Piguet.

shot_list.notes: Side lighting, 90° angle to show engagement. Keep watch case slightly out of focus to emphasise adapter mechanism.

shot_list.notes: Low angle, watch in sharp focus. Capture micro-movements of the strap but adapter must remain locked.

ai_prompts.prompt: Ultra-detailed macro photograph of the interior of a matte black watch adapter pressed against an octagonal bioceramic watch case-back. The adapter's microfibre lining is slightly compressed, showing texture and depth. Dark moody studio lighting with a single controlled side light casting soft shadows. Brushed silver and black accents, premium product photography aesthetic. High resolution, 8K, photorealistic, cinematic depth of field.

The adapter's microfibre-lined interior is revealed as it slides off the lugs, showing the texture against the case-back. visual_brief.filming_notes: Use a dark brushed steel surface as the base for all live shots. Ensure side lighting is consistent to maintain the moody, premium aesthetic. For the shake test, film in slow-motion to emphasise stability. Keep the watch and adapter in sharp focus for all close-ups.
